3020330.name: iPanzer 44
3020330.description:
Panzer Forward!

iPanzer '44: The Americans are relentless once again.

It's December 26, 1944, and you are in command of a battlegroup from the feared "Greyhound" division—the German 116th Panzer. Your mission is to reach Namur, but the 2nd US Armored Division has intercepted your forces. From the turret, you see that you’re heavily outnumbered. But with the rugged terrain in your favor, you skillfully maneuver your Panthers and Mark IVs to outflank the enemy, exploiting their weak side armor with precision. Victory will soon be within reach as you crush the rebel Yanks and seize control of Europe!

The legacy of armored warfare continues.

iPanzer '44: comes from the award-winning team behind iM1A2 Abrams™ and is designed for both novice and experienced players. Command American, Russian, or German tanks in the epic battles of 1944. Take charge of a single platoon of 3-5 tanks or a larger combined force with support vehicles, infantry, artillery, and even air support. Relive history—or rewrite it!

Features

- Experience realistic simulations of the three iconic WWII tanks: the American M4A3(76)W "Sherman," the German PzKw V Ausf.G "Panther," and the Russian T-34-85.

- Command a variety of vehicles, including tank destroyers, assault guns, halftracks, trucks, and jeeps.

- Battle across 80 diverse combat areas with dynamically generated encounters for endless replayability.

- Lead forces in four distinct campaigns: Fight as Americans or Germans in the "Battle of the Bulge," or as Russians or Germans on the intense "Eastern Front."

- Customize difficulty and realism settings to suit beginners or hardcore players.

- Optional 3D graphics acceleration with Direct 3D support for enhanced visuals.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
